channel.title: DeeperPoint Blog
channel.description: Thin market science, engineering, and the DeeperPoint ecosystem.

item.title: Thin Markets Are Why Canada Can't Diversify Its Trade — And AI Is How We Fix It
item.description: Canada has free trade agreements with most of the world. What it lacks is the market infrastructure to use them. Here's the structural problem — and what AI-driven market engineering changes.

item.title: Why Thin Markets Fail — And What AI Can Do About It
item.description: Most markets work. Some don't. The difference isn't willpower or capital — it's market physics. Here's why that matters, and what we're building to fix it.
